results.name: Frequency Bands RoPE ICLR 2026
results.rationale: Frequency band partitioning shares spectral-allocation idea but lacks Georgian polyphony specifics, fixed anchor positions, drone sink, or dissonant regularizer.

results.name: Mixed-Frequency RoPE EliteKV
results.rationale: Mixed-frequency RoPE per-dim allocation similar in spirit but no fixed anchors, no drone sink, no dissonant interval regularizer.

results.name: Hallucination Spectral Features Attention
results.rationale: Spectral features in attention for hallucination detection; uses term 'spectral' but unrelated to head-band partition, RoPE anchors, or polyphony-style mechanisms.

results.name: Harmonizer Universal Signal Tokenization
results.rationale: Universal signal tokenization with harmonic naming; not a spectral-allocation attention mechanism. No Georgian polyphony, no fixed RoPE anchors, no drone sink.

results.name: Rope to Nope Hybrid Attention Strategy
results.rationale: Hybrid RoPE/NoPE strategy resembles fixed-anchor vs free-swing distinction, but lacks 3-voice-band partition and dissonant interval regularizer.

results.name: Heterogeneous RoPE Per-Dim Role
results.rationale: Heterogeneous per-dimension RoPE assigns distinct roles to different dimensions, structurally analogous to mzakhri/zhir/bani 3-voice-band attention-head partition with role-specialized frequency allocation. Functional score crosses 0.7 threshold; HIT via func>=0.7.

results.name: VRoPE Video RoPE
results.rationale: Video-domain RoPE for spatiotemporal positions; no head-band partition, no fixed anchors, no dissonant regularizer.

results.name: New LLM Bottleneck MLA MoE
results.rationale: MLA/MoE bottleneck analysis; unrelated to spectral allocation, polyphony, or RoPE anchor sinks.

decision_rationale: 1 of 8 results (Heterogeneous RoPE Per-Dim Role) crosses thresholds via functional analogy to head-band role partition. Verifier verdict FAIL agrees with primary; primary 8 hits broader, verifier 1 hit per-paper stricter.
